title: Robo Romeo Lyrics Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Robo Romeo Song Lyrics from Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum
Singers: Monissha MM & Manissha MM

Robo romeo
Ne en boomiyo !!
Robo romeo
Kadhal kaamiyo kaamiyo kaamiyo!!

Geometry trigonometry
Because of this u-turn
May no entry.

Coffee day ponaa
Cappuccino Mela
Radio activity pottaanaa.

No chemistry
No biometry
..  Luv u but no guarantee.

Beachku ponaa
Andha alai alluvaano.
Oru Pechukku  kooda
...

En mookka thottu
Pythagoras sonnan.
En kanna paathu
Life ...sonnaan.

Indha solar bike
Night ellaam work aagumaa ?

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Robo Romeo'?

'Robo Romeo' explores the playful and modern aspects of love, using technology as a metaphor for romance.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum, the song reflects the lighthearted and romantic moments between the lead characters, showcasing their chemistry.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Manasi MM and Monissha MM, with music composed by Thaman S.

When was 'Robo Romeo' released?

'Robo Romeo' was released on November 23, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Robo Romeo' from Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum is a lively duet that captures the essence of modern love through its playful lyrics and upbeat tempo. It showcases the chemistry between the characters, making it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions. The vibrant music composed by Thaman S, combined with the engaging vocals of Manasi MM and Monissha MM, evokes feelings of joy and excitement. This track is sure to get everyone dancing and celebrating love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Robo Romeo from Thamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavum is a vibrant celebration of love and technology, blending catchy beats with playful lyrics. The unique collaboration of singers Manasi MM and Monissha MM brings an infectious energy that is hard to resist. Get ready to groove to this upbeat track that perfectly captures the essence of modern romance!
stanzaMeanings: Robo Romeo, Automatic Romeo, who is this?
Will they put a battery in a rose and give it to me?
Will algebra speak of love? Will they put a kiss in my mouth with a star?
Is this reason for the corner going to work?
Robo Romeo, you are my boom! Robo Romeo, love, love, love!
Robo Romeo, Automatic Romeo, who is this?
Will they put a battery in a rose and give it to me?
Geometry, trigonometry, because of this U-turn, no entry.
If I go to Coffee Day, will they put radio activity on cappuccino?
If I go to the theater, will they only watch the cinema without seeing anything else?
No chemistry, no biometry... I love you but there's no guarantee.
If I go to the beach, will that wave come? Even for a chat...
Is this Newton's son going to work?
Robo Romeo, you are my boom! Robo Romeo, love, love.
When it's time to eat, will they study thermodynamics?
Even if we give our mouth, will they study fluid mechanics?
Touching my nose, Pythagoras said. Looking at my eyes, life said...
Will this solar bike work all night?
